changeUsername.disabled: Beddelka magaca isticmaalaha waa la joojiyay si ku-meel-gaar ah.

contactInfo.title: Macluumaadka Xiriirka
contactInfo.headsUpMessage: In kasta oo macluumaadkani uu ikhtiyaari yahay, bixinta macluumaad (saxda ah) ayaa gargaari doona labadayada dhexmarsiinta iyo hoos u dhigista Dhibcahaaga Khatarta % ayna siineyso galitaanka degdegga ah iyo habboon qaybaha goobta (sida in aan loo xaqiijin kaarka deynta).
contactInfo.name: Magaca
contactInfo.gstinPlaceholder: Lambarka Aqoonsiga Canshuuraha Badeecadaha iyo Adeegyada
contactInfo.disablePasswordResets: Dib-u-dejinta Erayga Sirta (Eraygaaga Sirta Ma Ilowday) Jooji.
contactInfo.disableServerInvoiceReminders: Ogeysiisyada Iimaylka Xasuusinta Qaybsashada Server-ka Jooji.
contactInfo.alternateEmailInvoicesPlaceholder: Iimaylka kale ee loogu diro qaybsashada
